heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 259 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section, , , authorized Secretary of Army to sell supplies to aircraft operated by any foreign military or air attaché accredited to United States. See sections 4626, 4629, 9626, and 9629 of Title 10, Armed Forces.act May 31, 1939, ch. 16153 Stat. 795
